NAVAREA XIX 8/16
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 30 1830 UTC JAN 16. 
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 
73-26.5N - 024-15,4E     TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
72-46.3N - 024-23.5E     TRANSOCEAN ARCTIC
71-16.7N - 022-16.7E     SCARABEO 8
65-01.9N - 006-52.5E     DEEPSEA BERGEN
 
NOTES: 
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 04/16
